Package cz.cvut.fel.omo.deviceStates

Interface DeviceState

All Known Implementing Classes:
ActiveState, IdleState, OffState
public interface DeviceState

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    void getBroken​(Device device)
    This method breaks device.
    void getFixed​(Device device)
    This method fixes device.
    void startUsing​(Device device)
    This method does nothing for ActiveState.
    void stopUsing​(Device device)
    stops using of device, changes state to IDLE.
    java.lang.String toString()
    Returns string representation.
    void turnOff​(Device device)
    turns off device, changes state to Off.
    void turnOn​(Device device)
    This method does nothing for ActiveState.

  • Method Details

    • turnOn

      void turnOn​(Device device)
      This method does nothing for ActiveState.

    • startUsing

      void startUsing​(Device device)
      This method does nothing for ActiveState.

    • stopUsing

      void stopUsing​(Device device)
      stops using of device, changes state to IDLE.

    • turnOff

      void turnOff​(Device device)
      turns off device, changes state to Off.

    • getBroken

      void getBroken​(Device device)
      This method breaks device.

    • getFixed

      void getFixed​(Device device)
      This method fixes device.

    • toString

      java.lang.String toString()
      Returns string representation.
      Overrides:
      toString in class java.lang.Object
